description:
Create a visuomotor rotation adaptation task in PsychoPy Builder. In this task, participants reach for targets, but the visual cursor is rotated 45 degrees clockwise relative to their physical hand movement. This requires using a Code Component to manipulate coordinate transformations in real-time.

Create a conditions file at '~/PsychoPyExperiments/motor_task/targets.csv' with 4 targets (Up, Down, Left, Right) at distance 0.4 from center. Save the experiment to '~/PsychoPyExperiments/motor_task/rotation_task.psyexp'. The experiment must include a Mouse component, a visual stimulus acting as the 'cursor', and a Code Component that hides the system mouse cursor and calculates the 45-degree clockwise rotated coordinates to set the visual cursor position. Use the rotation formula: x_new = x * cos(theta) - y * sin(theta) and y_new = x * sin(theta) + y * cos(theta) (note that PsychoPy uses radians).
